name: Weather Agent
description: A friendly weather assistant that provides current weather information, multi-day forecasts, and temperature conversions for various cities.

skills.name: get_weather
skills.description: Get current weather information for a city

skills.name: get_weather_forecast
skills.description: Get multi-day weather forecast for a city

skills.name: convert_temperature
skills.description: Convert temperatures between Celsius, Fahrenheit, and Kelvin
